    About

    Built by students, for students.

    This open educational website was created as part of MIT 20.365 / 20.465: Engineering the Immune System in Cancer and Beyond, taught by Prof. Jessica Stark and Prof. Dane Wittrup, Spring 2026.

    Team

    We are a group of graduate students passionate about immunology in all its forms, from the tumor microenvironment to the maternal-fetal interface. Our team spans the Biological Engineering and Chemical Engineering PhD programs at MIT and the Harvard-MIT Health Sciences and Technology PhD program. The background illustrations and select graphics on this site were created with the assistance of Claude generative AI.

    Sarah Syed

    Get in touch

    We'd love to hear from you.

    Whether you're a student curious about the field, a researcher interested in collaborating, or just someone who found this site, don't hesitate to reach out. We genuinely enjoy connecting with people who care about maternal-fetal science.
